source.event_unit: one simulated event with jagged ECAL/HCAL hit deposits and MC particle truth

truth_conditioning.mcPar_energy: total energy in GeV; validated against the neutron mass shell

response_representations: ECAL/HCAL totals, hit counts, and shower moments
explicitly coordinate-binned HCAL tensor after validation
original jagged ECAL and HCAL hit vectors

hcal.restriction: Do not construct a fixed grid from hcal_LayerID and hcal_cellID alone.

must_preserve: jagged alignment across each detector hit vector
